title: physalis jaltomata
intro: Physalis jaltomata, also known as the Jaltomata or Ground Cherry, is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family that produces small, edible fruit enclosed in a papery husk. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Physalis jaltomata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its fruit can be eaten raw or used in jams and preserves.
